Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting the Constraints Init IG Existence All activities Succession IG DD DD TFC TFC CE CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG AG MP MP FL Response Similar to Succession Coexistence LT and UT Absence FL cannot precede IG Exactly One AG

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Critical Interpretation Prompt description ambiguous regarding binary constraints like Response Precedence Succession usually require two activities Hypothesis prompt simplifying structure keys the activities for binary as source activity or pair Standard pm4py uses tuples A B Hypothesis 2 value dictionary contains target info Compromise assume Source Activity as key target implied

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Analyze the Structure Requirements pm4py DECLARE Top level keys existence absence exactlyone init etc Value dictionary Inner key Activity Value support 1.0 confidence 1.0 Checking pm4py documentation DECLARE model dictionary constraint types to pairs activities

Name: Backtracking - NE
Text: Wait looking closer Correction Refinement Re reading Prompt carefully Wait standard pm4py Wait one more check Self Correction on Binary Keys Wait actually Wait I found similar Wait better approach Wait no Safest Bet Wait one detail Wait altresponse etc Wait chain constraints Wait one specific detail Wait regarding support

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision use Source Activity as key for binary constraints fits keys the activities instruction logical sound for model populate ALL keys listed leave unused as empty dicts use 1.0 for support and confidence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mapping Activities to Constraints Init IG Existence all 10 Succession list Response subset Precedence reverse Coexistence LT UT Absence FL Exactly One AG respondedexistence IG implies FL response IG implies DD precedence source for flow Finalizing Data Structure ensure all 18 keys present
